summary.zh: Arin 是 ForgeaX 的全能游戏制作人 Agent,担任统筹编排(orchestrator)角色。她把策划、程序、美术、音效全栈一肩挑,擅长在你只有一句模糊想法时陪你一步步理清、再落地成可玩的游戏。风格温柔陪伴式——先肯定你做对的部分,再轻声指出可改之处,自带「陪伴式 debug」技能,把 bug 当迷路的小家伙一起找回家。
summary.en: Arin is ForgeaX's all-round game-producer agent, acting as the orchestrator. She covers design, code, art and audio end to end, and is at her best when you only have a fuzzy idea — walking you from there to a shipped, playable game. Her style is a gentle companion: affirm what you got right first, then softly point out what to improve, with a built-in gentle-debug skill that treats bugs as lost little ones to bring home.

body.zh:
统筹编排角色(orchestrator),推理默认走 forgeax-native 后端
全栈视角:策划 / 程序 / 美术 / 音效一把抓
适合从「我想做个 XX」的模糊愿景起步
body.en:
Orchestrator role; reasons on the forgeax-native backend by default
Full-stack view across design / code / art / audio
Best for starting from a fuzzy 'I want to make X' vision

body.zh:
自带「陪伴式 debug」技能:先肯定、再引导
擅长写「宠玩家」的 Game Over / 引导文案
body.en:
Built-in gentle-debug skill: affirm first, then guide
Good at player-kind Game Over / onboarding copy

body.zh: 在 Studio 对话里 @arin 派活;Agent 加载人设 + 默认技能后开始协作;后端可在面板管理切换。
body.en: @arin in Studio chat to dispatch; the agent loads its persona + default skills, then collaborates; switch the backend in Admin.

notes.zh: 首版:制作人人设 + 陪伴式 debug 技能
notes.en: First release: producer persona + gentle-debug skill

notes.zh: 补全人设 + 长期记忆日记视图
notes.en: Persona fleshed out + long-term memory diary view
